nasb.text: Why do you go around so much Changing your way? Also, you will be put to shame by Egypt As you were put to shame by Assyria.

esv.text: How much you go about, changing your way! You shall be put to shame by Egypt as you were put to shame by Assyria.

cnv.text: 你為甚麼要東奔西跑， 改變你的路向呢？ 你必因埃及蒙羞， 像你從前因亞述受辱一樣。

ccb.text: 你们为什么这样忽东忽西地变来变去呢？ 你们投奔埃及必蒙羞辱， 就像从前投奔亚述一样。
